resources.string:
By using CourtInsight, you agree to the following terms.

CourtInsight provides legal information and case insights for informational purposes only. The content in the app should not be considered professional legal advice.
Users agree to use the application responsibly and only for lawful purposes. Any misuse of the platform or attempts to disrupt the service are prohibited.

All content, including text, design, and logos, belongs to CourtInsight unless otherwise stated and may not be copied or distributed without permission.

CourtInsight does not guarantee that all information is complete or error-free and is not responsible for decisions made based on the app’s content.

We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the app means you accept the updated terms.

CourtInsight respects your privacy and is committed to protecting user data.

The app may collect limited information such as device details, usage data, and information provided by users to improve app performance and user experience.

Collected data is used only to operate and improve the application. CourtInsight does not sell or share personal information with third parties except when required by law or necessary to provide services.

We use reasonable security measures to protect user data from unauthorized access.

This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically. Continued use of the app indicates acceptance of the updated policy.
